Defendant Andrew Kieve'S Motion For Terminating Sanctions
Off Calendar May-06-2008 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
No appearance. Defendant Andrew Kiev's motion for terminating sanctions is taken off calendar per moving party, dismissal has been filed. Commissioner Bruce Chan. Not reported.

Defendant Andrew Kieve'S Motion For Terminating Sanctions
Off Calendar Apr-22-2008 Continued To May-06-08 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 610
MINI MINUTES:
Appearance:
Tal Korn, Esq., for Defendant and moving party: Andrew Kieve

No other appearance. Defendant Andrew Kieve's motion for terminating sanctions is continued to May 6, 2008 at 9:00 a.m. per moving party to verify filing of dismissal by counsel for plaintiff or to hear the motion for terminating sanctions. Commissioner Bruce Chan. Not reported.

Notice Of Motion And Motion For Terminating Sanctions
Off Calendar Apr-10-2008 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
NO APPEARANCE STATED BY EITHER PARTY.
AFTER HEARING, Defendant Andrew Kieve's motion for monetary sanctions is granted in the amount of $1,230.
Counsel for plaintiff to fully comply with prior order and shall meet an confer to schedule the deposition.
The motion for terminating sanctions is continued to April 22, 2008 at 9:00 a.m. in Dept. 610. COMMISSIONER: BRUCE E. CHAN. Not reported.

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Mar-14-2008 Continued To Jun-16-08 At 01:30 P.M. In Dept 212

Notice Of Motion To Compel Pltfs' Responses To Written Discovery
Off Calendar Feb-05-2008 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
APPEARANCE:
Tal Korn, Esq., for defendant and moving party: Andrew Kieve

NO OTHER APPEARANCE. TENTATIVE RULING ADOPTED. Defendant Andrew Kieve's motion to compel responses to request for statement of damages, form interrogatories, and request for production of documents is granted. No opposition has been filed. Plaintiff is ordered to serve complete verified responses within 15 days of notice of this order. Monetary sanctions in the amount of $550 shall be paid within 30 days of notice of this order. COMMISSIONER: BRUCE E. CHAN. Not reported.

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Jan-15-2008 Set For Order To Show Cause On Mar-17-08 At 01:30 P.M. In Dept 212
